item.title: Workspace tool generators
item.intent: Generate all 7 workspace tool wrappers from blueprint config so the agent can act on the world. An agent without its tools is decoration.
item.description: AGENT'S HANDS: Tools are what the agent can DO. An email agent without an email tool can't triage inbox. Blueprint-driven generation means tools are consistent with what the identity and skills expect. CLI wrappers (bash/python3) are thin — they call himalaya, caldav, etc. — so adding a new integration means writing a wrapper, not modifying the agent. Acceptance: all 7 tool wrappers generate correctly from blueprint config; generated tools executable in container; tool names match blueprint's tool references in AGENTS.md.
steps: Generate CLI tool wrappers for: email, tasks, todoist, ical, quote, tavily, todoist-sync
Derive tool configuration from blueprint YAML
Ensure generated wrappers are executable in container
Match tool names to blueprint's tool references in AGENTS.md
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 tool wrappers generate correctly from blueprint config
Generated tools are executable in container
Tool names match blueprint's tool references in AGENTS.md
